
## User Story 1
As a user, I want to register an account so that I can access the platform.
Label: new

## User Story 2
As a user, I want to log in so that I can access my account.
Label: backlog

## User Story 3
As a user, I want to view all gifts so that I can browse options.
Label: new

## User Story 4
As a user, I want to search gifts by category so that I can find relevant items.
Label: backlog

## User Story 5
As a user, I want to view gift details so that I can decide what to buy.
Label: new

## User Story 6
As a developer, I want to improve API performance so that the app runs faster.
Label: technical debt

## User Story 7
As a user, I want to save favorite gifts so that I can revisit them later.
Label: icebox

## User Story 8
As a user, I want to logout so that my account remains secure.
Label: backlog
